title: ranunculus tenebricans
intro: Ranunculus tenebricans, also known as the Black Ranunculus or Black Buttercup, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Ranunculus tenebricans are attributed to its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to make medicinal teas, salves, and poultices for topical application.
